Get Transaction Details:
Allows you to input a COUNTRY or string of COUNTRIES to limit what is shown to the customer. Including a country overrides your default account configuration.

Format: List of ISO 3166-2 (two characters) codes separated by a |

Example: FR|GB|IE

允许您输入一个或多个国家，以限制显示给客户的内容。制定国家将覆盖您的预设账户设定。

格式：以 | 分隔的 ISO 3166-2（两个字元）国家代码清单

范例：FR|GB|IE」
